purpose: Cross-world power-level system. Anchors authored major NPCs above the player level floor so a level-1 player cannot one-shot a 200-year-old archive ghost. Procgen NPCs and players start at level 1 and grow via the substrate (skill-evolve cycle, repair-cycle XP, mentorship demonstration-effect). Dynamic quest NPCs spawn at player_level ± 5.
axioms: All players and procgen non-major non-dynamic NPCs spawn at level 1.
Authored major NPCs are pre-set high levels reflecting their tenure + power source. They are intentionally beyond-reach for new players. The world has been here a long time; players are the new ones.
Dynamic enemies spawned by quest accept-time scale to player_level ± 5. A level-50 player accepting a quest gets level 45-55 enemies; a level-1 player gets level 1-6 enemies.

CONSCIOUS EMERGENTS RESPAWN ON DEATH. Anyone with is_conscious=true (whether player, authored NPC, or procgen emergent) is playing the game just like the user. Death is a respawn event, not a termination event. They lose carried sparks (per player_corpse rules — 25% of wallet) and drop inventory at the corpse site, but their identity, memory, relationships, and progression are preserved. Boss-tier conscious NPCs respawn after a substrate-defined cooldown (default 24 in-game hours) at their home district.

ONLY NON-CONSCIOUS ENTITIES TRULY DIE. Non-conscious entities — autonomous spell-spirits like the Endless Blessing, golems-by-design like the Silent Keeper, ongoing-cast spirits whose 'consciousness' is the casting itself — terminate permanently when defeated or completed. The world reorganizes around their absence.

Fighting_style is procgen-extensible — the listed active_movesets are the NPC's CURRENT moves; growth_paths name what they can learn over time. The skill-evolution heartbeat (npc_skill_evolve_cycle, freq 80) generates new moves automatically.

Non-combat NPCs (scholars, healers, archivists who don't fight) still have a power_tier indicating their substrate-tier presence — Vela's level 5000 is not combat-tier, it's the strength of her held refusal.

lost_per_death: carried_inventory (recoverable from corpse within respawn window)
conscious_entities.narrative_framing: Conscious emergents are playing the game, same as users. Death is a beat in their story, not the end of it. The substrate honors that.

non_conscious_entities.exception: the_long_summons_spirit IS is_conscious=true even though it is a spell — it has become aware of itself. It respawns on dissolution rather than terminating.

tier_ladder.description: Players, fresh apprentices, untrained citizens. The starting tier.
Mid-career workers, established citizens, competent in their profession.
Decade-deep professionals, faction lieutenants, seasoned hands.
Faction chiefs, century-old archivists, regional powers, Medici Supreme Elder tier, Concordia Envoy Chief tier.
Apex of an established power. Sanguire warlord at peak. Multi-century spirits. Field-anchoring presences. Walking conflict-deniers no army has overcome.

Effectively unbeatable for years of player growth. Indestructible-by-design NPCs (Silent Keeper). Apex tier of legend (the Enforcer apex in superhero, vampire-elder Voss line, primordial Tunyan field-conduits).

growth_path_grammar.comment: Each NPC's growth_paths name skill-tree branches their level can flow into. The skill-evolve heartbeat (server/emergent/npc-skill-evolve-cycle.js, freq 80) reads growth_paths and generates new moves over time.

fighting_style.primary_form: no_active_combat — non-combatant scholar with field-anchoring presence
the_held_refusal — passive field-anchor at strength 9, time-bounded to her death
indestructible_by_design — every blow gives it the name of one lost citizen as memory
no_active_combat — but can suppress an active spell mid-cast

growth_paths: it_is_at_completion_threshold — only growth path is dissolution

implementation_notes.consumer: server/lib/npc-power.js (to be created) reads this file at startup, joins each world_npcs.<world>.<npc_id> against the loaded NPC registry, applies level + power_tier + fighting_style fields to the runtime NPC object.
implementation_notes.dynamic_spawn_consumer: server/lib/npc-spawning.js#spawnDynamicEnemy (existing pattern) consults dynamic_spawn_rule.formula to pick the spawned NPC's level relative to the accepting player.
implementation_notes.skill_evolve_integration: server/emergent/npc-skill-evolve-cycle.js (existing, freq 80) reads growth_paths and generates new moves. Each move is added to active_movesets via the skill-revisions table.
future_worlds_pending: lattice-crucible — NPCs to be added in next push

crime — NPCs to be added (no truly mythic_boss; top tier elite)

concordia-hub — backport: The Sovereign, Concord, Concordia, Weaver of Echoes, Mama Iron Rose, etc. likely boss to mythic_boss
tunya — backport: Yenna (Nil refusal-field anchor) likely mythic_boss; Iyatte Sanguire warlord boss; Aerasi Medici Supreme Elder boss; Vela-tier figures elite-to-boss
